name: Pramod Varma
role: Co-founder and Chief Architect, Networks for Humanity
body: Pramod is one of the architects of India's digital public infrastructure: former Chief Architect of Aadhaar and IndiaStack, co-creator of the Beckn protocol and Finternet, and long-time CTO of EkStep Foundation. He now co-founds Networks for Humanity and co-chairs the Centre for Digital Public Infrastructure. His thinking on open networks underpins how DRISTI is designed.
